runtime.staticExportReason: next.config.ts does not set output: 'export'; V0.5 is validated with next start.

originAndDataBoundary.formalDomainSwitchNotice: Data imported under a platform default domain will not automatically appear under a later formal domain because IndexedDB and localStorage are scoped to origin.

isGitRemoteNeeded.notes: This task does not create a Git remote. Hosted platforms commonly require a Git remote or equivalent code source.

isDeploymentPlatformAccountNeeded.notes: A hosted Node platform requires an account. Self-hosting requires server access instead.

isFormalDomainNeeded.notes: A stable HTTPS platform default domain can be used first, but data will be tied to that origin.

conditions: The user accepts that later formal-domain data will not auto-migrate.

httpsAndFixedOriginRequired.notes: Production use requires HTTPS and a fixed origin because browser storage is origin-scoped.

deploymentOptions.label: 托管 Node 平台
deploymentOptions.dataBoundary: Browser IndexedDB/localStorage remains origin-scoped; no server database is required.
risks: Usually requires Git remote or an equivalent code source.
Switching from platform default domain to formal domain will not auto-migrate browser data.
The selected platform must support Node runtime for Next.js rather than static-only hosting.

deploymentOptions.label: 静态托管
deploymentOptions.dataBoundary: Browser data would still be origin-scoped if a future static export exists.
risks: Current V0.5 does not support static export.
Using static hosting now would require code/config changes and a separate regression cycle.
Pure static output is not the validated deployment artifact.

deploymentOptions.label: 自托管 Node
deploymentOptions.dataBoundary: Server does not hold business data; browser storage remains tied to the served origin.
risks: Operator must manage Node version, process supervision, HTTPS, domain, rollback, and security patches.
Changing host, port, protocol, or domain changes origin and separates browser data.
Rollback must not clear browser IndexedDB or localStorage.

deploymentOptions.label: 其他符合合同的 Node 运行方案
deploymentOptions.dataBoundary: Must preserve stable HTTPS origin and browser-local data boundaries.
risks: Temporary URLs or changing ports can break the fixed-origin requirement.
HTTP production access does not satisfy the HTTPS requirement.
This must not be represented as shared multi-user production.

recommendedOption.reason: V0.5 requires Node runtime, does not support static export, and does not require server database/backend/server file storage.

nextDecisionNeededFromUser: Choose hosted Node platform, self-hosted Node, or another contract-compliant Node runtime.
Decide whether to use a platform default HTTPS domain first.
Decide whether and when to bind a formal domain.
Approve whether a Git remote or platform project may be created in a later task.
